llvm::MCRegUnitMaskIterator Class Reference

#include <MCRegisterInfo.h>

Public Member Functions

 MCRegUnitMaskIterator ()

 Returns a (RegUnit, LaneMask) pair.
bool isValid () const
 Returns true if this iterator is not yet at the end.
void operator++ ()
 Moves to the next position.

Detailed Description

MCRegUnitIterator enumerates a list of register units and their associated lane masks for Reg. The register units are in ascending numerical order.

Definition at line 560 of file MCRegisterInfo.h.
